pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA AB-T-004 (Core Abilities) scores 0.436 composite (signal: weak). Scope fit for LLMOps Engineer: edge_case. Preliminary decision: include.

pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: KSA excluded at Pass 2 (scope: edge_case) or Pass 3. No market evidence warrants reversal for LLMOps Engineer.
